description: Keep later platform and lithography ecosystem nodes from returning as direct prerequisites for earlier payment and process-node anchors.

checks.reason: Mid-1990s online payment processing predates the web-API economy anchor, so API Economy should not be a direct prerequisite.
The process-node node is anchored to 1979 VLSI-era design-rule generations; 1982 DUV excimer lithography is later scaling context.
